name: metaflow-workspace
description: MetaFlow workspace for layered AI metadata overlays for Copilot instructions, prompts, skills, and agents.

scripts.build: npm -w @metaflow/engine run build && npm -w @metaflow/cli run build && npm -w metaflow run compile
scripts.gate:quick: npm run build && npm -w metaflow run lint && npm run test
scripts.gate:full: npm run test:engine && npm run test:cli && npm -w metaflow run gate:quick && npm -w metaflow run gate:integration
scripts.test: npm run test:engine && npm run test:cli && npm run test:unit
